title: Cobblemon Cobbletwo - Best Cobblemon Experience
description: Pokemon Cobblemon Pack - QoL and Performance mods! The server included in the pack has Every Pokemon, Mega Evolution and Legendary Spawns, Player Gyms, Raids, GTS, Pokemon Fishing, Races and more!
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fe8a2510a4e50436a9ec4458ea58d6ebf738e64.png) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15b000bd0a9682a6c903c17f2733b49e978ab7c4.png) ### Server Features - Take your **Shiny Starter**, your backpack and your Pokédex today! - **Mount** your favorite Pokémon, and increase your friendship with it. - Battle against **Gym** leaders to get every medal and become the Pokémon Champion! - Get Free ranks and crate keys by voting and being active on the server! - D-did you hear that r-roar? Yeah, legendary Pokémon spawns here and there. - Join the Pokémon GO-style **Raids** to catch the Boss and get yummy rewards! ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15b000bd0a9682a6c903c17f2733b49e978ab7c4.png) ### QoL Mods - [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats): Enhances Minecraft's statistics screen with a more user-friendly UI, filters, and a search field for easier navigation and tracking of numerous entries. - [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby): Allows for render distances beyond the server's view-distance setting. - [Continue Button](https://modrinth.com/mod/continue): Creates a button on the main menu screen that allows you to quickly load into the previous world or server you were playing on. - [Durability Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/durability-plus): Adds simple and elegant item durability tooltips. - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity): Allows for efficient connected textures - [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps): Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background or idle. - [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair): Hides or changes the crosshair dependent on context - [Emoji Type](https://modrinth.com/mod/emoji-type): Allows you to easily type emoji and emoticons in game. - [Iris Shaders ](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris): A modern shaders mod for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs. - [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves): Adds a neat little particle effect to leaf blocks. - [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap): Displays a map of the nearby world terrain, players, mobs, entities in the corner of your screen. Lets you create waypoints which help you find the locations you've marked. - [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map): Adds a full screen world map which shows you what you have explored in the world. - [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei): Alternative to Just Enough Items/JEI. - [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify): A zoom mod with infinite customizability. - [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat): A working voice chat in Minecraft! - [Crafting Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-tweaks): Allows you to rotate, balance or clear the crafting matrix by the press of a button. - [Inventory Essentials](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-essentials): Basic inventory tweaks. Lightweight and compatible. - [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes): Adds splashes and wakes while traveling on water. - [Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques): Replace the advancement popups with fancy glowing plaques. - [InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove): Adds the ability to walk around while in inventories. - [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements): Improve the UI and UX for the advancements system. - [Symbol Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/symbol-chat): Adds a symbol/emoji menu as well as writing in different unicode fonts. - [Dark Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen): Makes the loading screen darker. - [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade): Shows information about what you are looking at. - [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person): Improves third person camera view. - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin): Food/hunger-related HUD improvements - [CraftPresence](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftpresence): Completely customize the way others see you play in Discord! - [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality): Little visual improvements by adding a bunch of new particles. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15b000bd0a9682a6c903c17f2733b49e978ab7c4.png) ### Performance & Fixes Mods - [Adaptive Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/adaptive-tooltips): Highly configurable tooltip rendering, so you can always read them! - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling): Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible. - [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe): - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium): A modern rendering engine for Minecraft which greatly improves performance. - [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra): A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium. - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium): No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod. - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium): Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core): Memory usage optimizations - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast): Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft - [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling): Changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance - [Title Fix Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/title-fix-mod): When exiting a world or server, the in game title overlay will be cleared to prevent transferring to the next world. - [Item Model Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-model-fix): Fixes gaps in generated item models. - [Chat Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches): Touches up a few aspects of Minecraft's mundane chat, with as much configurability as possible! - [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton): Mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack. - [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu): Makes the game boot faster by deferring non-essential initialization. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15b000bd0a9682a6c903c17f2733b49e978ab7c4.png) ### Resource/Shader Packs - [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface): Makes Minecraft's interface and sounds fit the Cobblemon mod aesthetics. - [Cobblemon Emissive Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-emissive-ores): Help you find those tough-to-see ores lurking in water, or on the cave roof. - [Cobblemon Classic Grass Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-classic-grass-pack): Replaces the grass to a more inspired in Pokémon. and the minecraft tall grass replacement texture is highly inspired by the long grass from Pokémon Ruby & Sapphire & Emerald. - [Cobblemon - GS Apricorn Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-gs-apricorn-leaves): Replaces the Cobblemon Apricorn leaves with a softer texture. - [3D Crops Revamped](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-crops): Simply turns your crops into 3D blocks! - [PokePlaques](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pokeplaques-cobblemon): Integrates with the Advancement Plaques mod bringing a new Pokémon themed achievements GUI. - [Round Trees](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/round-trees): Trees are round in real life, why aren't they in Minecraft? - [Motschen's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves): Makes the leaves bushy. - [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders): Shaderpack for Minecraft: Java Edition. It's bright, colorful, and distinct. - [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound): Transforming the visuals of Minecraft with exceptional quality, detail, and performance. - [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined): Preserving the elements of Minecraft with exceptional quality, detail, and performance. - [Kappa Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/kappa-shader): A high-quality realistic, yet also somewhat stylized shaderpack. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15b000bd0a9682a6c903c17f2733b49e978ab7c4.png) ### SUMMARY
- Pokédex - Gyms - Mega Evos - Battle Tower - Raids - Breeding System - Wondertrades - GTS - Mass Outbreaks - Tournaments - Hunting Bounties - Fishing - Land Claiming - Server Shop - Custom Terrain Gen. - Custom Enchantments Server Features
- Better Statistics Screen - Bobby - Continue Button - Durability Tool Tips - Continuity - Dynamic FPS - Dynamic Crosshair - Emoji Type - Iris Shaders - Falling Leaves - Mod Menu - Xaeros World and Mini Map - Roughly Enough Items - Simple Voice Chat - Crafting Tweaks - Inventory Essentials - Wakes - Advancement Plaques - InvMove - Better Advancements - Symbol Chat - Dark Loading Screens - Jade - Better Third Person - AppleSkin - CraftPresence - Visuality QoL Mods
- Adaptive Tool Tips - Entity Culling - Enhanced Block Entities - Sodium - Sodium Extra - Lithium - Indium - FerriteCore - Immediately Fast - More Culling - Title Fixer - Item Model Fixer - Chat Patches Performance/Fixes Mods
- 3D Crops Revamped(Disabled Default) - Kiece Cobblemon Minimap Icons (Enabled Default) - Kiece Icons v4.1 VCompat (Enabled Default) - Cobblemon Emissive Ores (Disabled Default) - Poke Plaques (Enabled Default) - Held Item Descriptions (Enabled Default) - TPC Vitamin Descriptions (Enabled Default) - Motschen's Better Leaves (not enabled by default) - - Round Trees (not enabled by default) - Complementary Shaders - Reimagined Resource/Shader Packs
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15b000bd0a9682a6c903c17f2733b49e978ab7c4.png)
